title: 20cm Plant Pots Indoor Plant Planters - Set of 3 Modern Decorative Plastic Planters Indoor/Outdoor Plant Flower Pots with No Drainage Holes Windowsill Holder Balcony Container for Home Deco (Black)
features: Material:Plastic plant pots are made by 5.1mm PP materials. It’s lightweight, durable, sturdy plastic with a matte exterior finish for a clean modern look.
Set of 3 Pots: 8''D x 7''H. Ideal for large and medium-sized houseplants, including Aloe Vera, Snake Plants,Peace Lily, ZZ Plants, Orchid, Succulent, and Herbs (plants NOT included).

Modern Design:Stylish, modern design complements any home or office decor, providing an attractive visual display for your plants. These pots enhance the appearance of your plants, making them look even more beautiful.

No Holes on the bottom:Our garden pots and house plant pots have no drainage holes so they can also be used as a cover and also as a proper plant pot after drilling the holes in the place which is factory marked for this purpose.(But you can alos make holes at the bottem)

Wide Used:It can be use as a desk organizer, decorative element in your living room, wardrobe or bathroom. You can use it both in the children's room and in the workshop. For kids and adults. Indoor and outdoor. Without limits
description: Product Description 8inch Large Modern Plant Pots Planters for Indoor Outdoor Plastic Plant Pots with no Hole Modern Decorative Garden Pot Plastic Planters for Indoor Plants - Ideal for Indoor Home Decorations No Drainage Holes no drainage holes so they can also be used as a cover PP materials Plastic plant pots are made by 5.1mm PP materials. It’s lightweight, durable, sturdy plastic Wide Used It can be use as a desk organizer, decorative element in your room
